notes: Photo quality settings: When creating a project, you can now choose the quality of the photos to balance quality and storage space in your browser.
Print Report: The report now opens in a new tab in a print-friendly format, allowing direct printing without relying on pop-ups (which may be blocked/disabled).
WebP photo support: Photo input now accepts .webp images when supported by the browser.
Browser storage indicator – The app footer now displays the amount of browser storage used by the app.
